rationale: Section 26.0441's formulas use 'Current Total Value,' which already accounts for homestead exemptions. Increasing the exemption reduces taxable value but does not conflict with or require amendment to this section; the formula operates as written.
quote: Amount of Increase = Enhanced Indigent Health Care Expenditures / (Current Total Value - New Property Value)
_note: No direct conflict. Increasing the homestead exemption under §11.13(b) would reduce 'Current Total Value' used in the §26.0441 denominator, producing a marginally higher indigent health care rate adjustment, but the statute operates as written without amendment.
